sourceIds.release: DepMap public release re-hosted by Biomni (biomni-release S3); exact release id TODO(prod): pin before Slice 3

acquisitionQuery.geneEffectSelection: Select the exact column TACSTD2 (4070), preserving every release model row and missing value.
acquisitionQuery.metadataSelection: Select ModelID, CellLineName, OncotreeLineage, and OncotreePrimaryDisease from Model.csv from the same release; left-join metadata models to TACSTD2 gene effect by ModelID.

resolvedUrls.note: depmap.org is behind Cloudflare Turnstile; fetched from Biomni's public re-hosted DepMap release (same data, same approach Biomni uses).

acquisitionQuery.selection: Retain TACSTD2 median TPM by GTEx tissue; do not infer cell type, epithelial localization, surface protein, or toxicity.

acquisitionQuery.selection: Keep TACSTD2 values and classify each sample as tumor, normal, or unknown from same-study sample metadata. Tumor and normal are reported separately; no comparison to GTEx.
